summary: Added error propagation to the three spawn sites in AgentState. set_thinking_level, cycle_thinking, and set_mode now accept Option<mpsc::UnboundedSender<AppEvent>>. On error, they log via tracing::warn! (existing behaviour) AND send AppEvent::CommandMessage with StatusLevel::Error and transient=true to surface the error in the TUI status bar and toast overlay. All six call sites in input_handling.rs and command_support.rs were updated to pass Some(app_tx.clone()). The CommandMessage handler in event_dispatch.rs (pre-existing) routes these to set_status(StatusLevel::Error) which is already wired to the TUI status bar display. No new AppEvent variants were needed.
cargo_check_notes: cargo check --workspace fails due to two pre-existing errors unrelated to these changes: (1) ava-tools: missing field `scrub_env` in ExecuteOptions initializers in lint.rs and test_runner.rs; (2) ava-agent: build_tool_registry called with 4 args but now takes 5. The ava-tui crate itself has no new errors introduced by these changes.
